# Implement Family-Specific AI Features

## Description
Develop AI features specifically designed for family dynamics, including child-friendly interactions, parental controls, and family-specific scheduling patterns.

## Use Case
Children can ask the AI "When is my soccer practice?" and get age-appropriate responses, while parents can set up automated reminders for family events.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Child-friendly AI interactions
- [ ] Age-appropriate responses and language
- [ ] Parental control settings
- [ ] Family-specific scheduling patterns
- [ ] Automated family event reminders
- [ ] Child activity tracking
- [ ] Family member role-based permissions

## Technical Requirements
- [ ] Implement age-appropriate AI responses
- [ ] Add parental control system
- [ ] Create family role management
- [ ] Develop child-safe interaction modes
- [ ] Add family-specific scheduling tools
- [ ] Implement automated family reminders

## Implementation Notes
- Use different AI prompts for different age groups
- Implement content filtering for children
- Store family member roles and permissions
- Consider privacy for child accounts
